api_key.description: Greenhouse Harvest API token, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username with a blank password (Authorization: Basic base64(api_key:)); never logged.

base_url.description: Greenhouse Harvest API v1 base URL override, for tests or proxies.

page_size.description: Records per page for list streams (1-500 in the legacy connector; declarative requests pass the configured value as per_page).

mode.description: Legacy runtime mode: live (default) or fixture. The declarative engine does not branch on this value; conformance uses JSON fixtures directly.

application_id.description: Application Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

approval_flow_id.description: Approval Flow Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

candidate_id.description: Candidate Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

custom_field_id.description: Custom Field Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

demographic_answer_id.description: Demographic Answer Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

demographic_answer_option_id.description: Demographic Answer Option Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

demographic_question_id.description: Demographic Question Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

demographic_question_set_id.description: Demographic Question Set Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

department_id.description: Department Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

email_template_id.description: Email Template Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

field_type.description: Field Type used by Greenhouse stream paths.

job_id.description: Job Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

job_post_id.description: Job Post Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

job_stage_id.description: Job Stage Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

offer_id.description: Offer Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

office_id.description: Office Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

on_behalf_of_user_id.description: Optional Greenhouse user ID sent as On-Behalf-Of for audited Harvest mutations; omitted when unset.

opening_id.description: Opening Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

prospect_pool_id.description: Prospect Pool Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

scheduled_interview_id.description: Scheduled Interview Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

scorecard_id.description: Scorecard Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.

token.description: Token used by Greenhouse stream paths.

user_id.description: User Id used by Greenhouse stream paths.
